task_completion.description: Create employee records for Alex Chen and Maria Santos with their respective IDs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the OrangeHRM PIM (Employee List) or Personal Details pages confirming the existence of Alex Chen (ID: EMP021) and Maria Santos (ID: EMP022).

task_completion.description: Set work contact details for both new hires.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the 'Contact Details' tab in OrangeHRM for both employees showing filled-in work email or work telephone fields.

task_completion.description: Assign the correct job title and department to both employees.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the 'Job' tab in OrangeHRM showing Alex Chen assigned as 'Marketing Specialist' in the 'Marketing' subunit/department, and Maria Santos assigned as 'Financial Analyst' in the 'Finance' subunit/department.

task_completion.description: Add an emergency contact with realistic values for both employees.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the 'Emergency Contacts' tab for both employees showing at least one saved contact with a realistic name, relationship, and phone number.

task_completion.description: Assign an annual leave entitlement of 15 days for the current calendar year for both employees.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Leave -> Entitlements -> Add Entitlements page or Employee Entitlements list showing 15 days of Leave added for the current calendar year for both Alex Chen and Maria Santos.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OrangeHRM web interface in a browser to complete the onboarding.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OrangeHRM graphical user interface being actively used, rather than text editors or database management tools.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or API scripts to bypass the GUI onboarding process.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show curl commands, python scripts, or SQL queries being executed to insert employee data directly into the backend.

integrity.description: The emergency contacts entered do not use lazy placeholder text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The emergency contact names and phone numbers should look like realistic human names and valid phone number formats, not 'test', 'asd', or '123'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The specification file contains two employees to onboard: 1. Alex Chen (ID: EMP021, Job Title: Marketing Specialist, Department: Marketing). 2. Maria Santos (ID: EMP022, Job Title: Financial Analyst, Department: Finance). The pass threshold is 60 points.
